headline: Trump 🍊👑 CANCELS 🛑 Housing BILL 💰🏠 for Voter ID 🪪🍊 Drama
text: Trump 🍊👑 straight up GHOSTED 👻 the SIGNING ✍️ of the 21st CENTURY ROAD 🛣️ to HOUSING ACT 🏠💰 just HOURS ⏰ before the BIG CAPITOL 🎪 CEREMONY 🎉! Congress went FULL BIPARTISAN 🤝 across the aisle to SLAY 🗡️ the HOUSING CRISIS 🏚️😩 that’s got 89% of VOTERS 🗳️ SWEATING 💦 over SKY-HIGH 🪂 PRICES 💸! Median HOME 🏡 now a WHOPPING $403K 💎 while families need $117K 💵 SALARY just to AFFORD 🤑 it - that’s a $30K GAP 🕳️ making the AMERICAN DREAM 🦅🏠 feel like a NIGHTMARE 😱! Bill drops 40+ PROVISIONS 📜 to BUILD 🏗️ MORE SUPPLY 📦 and SLASH 🪒 COSTS, even letting DISASTER 🌀 areas REBUILD ⚒️ FAST and keeping RURAL 🐄 housing CHEAP 💰! Trump 🍊👑 said NAH ✋ until the SAVE AMERICA ACT 🛡️🗳️ drops with STRICT VOTER ID 🪪 and PROOF OF CITIZENSHIP 🇺🇸! He’s all about LOWERING 📉 INTEREST RATES 📊 so folks can MORTGAGE 🏦 like CRAZY but warns it could BUBBLE 💥 INFLATION 🔥 and WEAKEN 💸 the DOLLAR! Senate Boss John Thune (L) 😎 and Dem Queen Elizabeth Warren 🧢💼 both CONFUSED 😵 about the GHOSTING 👻 while some GOP reps thought he’d still SIGN ✍️! Trump 🍊👑 ignored REPORTERS 📰 and pushed his VOTER ID 🪪 bill instead, calling it a NATIONAL EMERGENCY 🚨! Meanwhile experts say this is the BIGGEST 🏆 HOUSING MOVE since 2000 - more SUPPLY 📦 means LOWER 📉 PRICES for the PEOPLE 🧑‍🤝‍🧑 but Trump 🍊👑 wants his SAVE AMERICA ACT 🛡️ first or the bill might AUTO-PASS 🏃‍♂️ in TEN DAYS 📅! Republicans facing MIDTERMS 🗳️ were HYPE 😤 to claim the WIN 🏆 but now it’s all DRAMA 🎭 and VOTER ID 🪪 STALEMATE! Housing affordability is the HOT 🔥 BUTTON and Trump 🍊👑 just turned the HEAT 🌡️ UP even more!
